title: John Swinney Criticized Over US Military Use of Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Calls for Action
sections.content: John Swinney has been accused of inactivity regarding the presence of US troops at Prestwick Airport, which is owned by the Scottish Government. Critics argue that urgent measures are needed amidst the current geopolitical tensions.

sections.heading: Background Context
sections.content: The US-Israeli conflict involving Iran has raised concerns over military operations, prompting discussions around the implications of US troop movements in Scotland. Prestwick Airport's role in this context has come under scrutiny.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney accused of 'sitting on his hands' while US uses Prestwick Airport
